description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the rust:latest Docker image, caches apt packages in the apt/ directory and Cargo files in cargo/ and target/, and defines variables APT_CACHE_DIR and CARGO_HOME pointing to those cache locations. Define two stages: test and build. In the test stage add a test job that runs rustc --version, cargo --version, and cargo test --verbose, with a before_script that executes apt-get update -yq. No additional rules, only/except conditions, or deployment targets are required.
